steps.title: Recognize the list
steps.content: The sentence introduces three signature elements of Brooks's poetic style. What follows style is a list of those elements, beginning with terse, compressed lines.

steps.title: Use a colon before the list
steps.content: A creates an incorrect sentence break, C uses only a comma to introduce the list, and D uses a semicolon where a list introduction is needed. A colon after style is appropriate. The answer is B.
